text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, we'll choose some Support Cards
to assist you and your trainee during her
Career!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Each card comes with various benefits,
such as the Support Card character
appearing in your playthrough and
providing skills for your trainee to
acquire.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
With that said, you can't choose a
Support Card depicting the same
Umamusume that you selected to train.
Please keep that in mind!
color_text_info_list: the same Umamusume that you selected to train
